case_title: LUIS DIEGO ORTIZ MAGANA VS. CRISTIANA V. PEREIRA

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF ORTIZ MAGANA, LUIS DIEGO AS TO DEFENDANT PEREIRA, CRISTIANA V. AN INDIVIDUAL DBA AMAZON AUTO BODY JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

AN INDIVIDUAL DBA AMAZON AUTO BODY $11,555.41 PRINCIPAL, $1,033.40 INTEREST, $370.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $12,958.81, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
